WHO I AM

I'm a filmmaker who learned to code, and a founder who never stopped telling stories.

For six years I've lived at the seam between narrative and technology — shooting video essays, editing motion, and shipping products. The camera taught me how people feel. The codebase taught me how things work. I build in the overlap.

I've produced 250+ videos, co-founded companies, and led engineering as a CTO — but the through-line has always been the same: take something real, make people care about it, and make it move.

Shubham FILMMAKER · FOUNDER · TECH LEAD
